nodes.label: AI as thinking tool for ideation and connection
nodes.label_negative: AI as writing tool producing final content
nodes.grounding_span: For me it's more of a thinking tool than a writing tool

nodes.label: AI as creative catalyst for novel angles
nodes.label_negative: AI producing generic or non-human output
nodes.grounding_span: I'm looking for that nugget of gold that is a new way of thinking about these topics

nodes.label: AI as fast but imperfect assistant
nodes.grounding_span: It's almost like I have an intern. They're not perfect but they do the work quick

nodes.label: Workplace acceptance of AI use
nodes.label_negative: Workplace restriction or caution toward AI
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that my workplace embraces AI

nodes.label: AI with specialized expertise modes
nodes.label_negative: AI as jack of all trades without depth
nodes.grounding_span: Have a mode where you can say 'creativity mode' or 'editorial mode' and it would have some level of expertise

nodes.label: AI visual quality for professional use
nodes.label_negative: AI visuals as terrible and unusable
nodes.grounding_span: the visuals as they are now are terrible. I would not use any of them

nodes.label: Creative efficiency and speed
nodes.grounding_span: I can get project started much quicker

nodes.label: Novelty and fresh presentation
nodes.grounding_span: find novel ways to present the information

nodes.label: Human creativity and expertise
nodes.grounding_span: human creativity is gonna go the way of journalism

nodes.label: Authentic human-like communication
nodes.grounding_span: AI will eventually be really, really good at sounding human

nodes.label: Enthusiasm for AI as ideation partner
nodes.grounding_span: I am all for using AI

nodes.label: Caution due to workplace restrictions
nodes.grounding_span: I have to be careful on how much I'm using the tool

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI's unexpected creative contributions
nodes.grounding_span: It was great. So when I am using AI, I'm looking for that nugget of gold

nodes.label: Concern about AI eroding human creativity and expertise
nodes.grounding_span: human creativity is gonna go the way of journalism

nodes.label: Hope for improved AI visuals with ethical safeguards
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that the photography/video production capabilities of AI will improve a lot. But not so much where nefarious people are sending out fake videos

nodes.label: Iterative prompting and refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I ran it through AI many times to see how to connect

nodes.label: Analogical bridging between disparate themes
nodes.grounding_span: how to connect the very corporate purpose practice people into the fun movie Summer Blockbuster
